roi_calculation: High - Automating financial flows prevents revenue loss. Manual regression of payment logic takes ~12 hours/sprint. Automation pays off after 7 executions.
infrastructure_setup: Stripe CLI fixtures in CI, LocalStack for Cognito mocks
success_metrics: 100% pass rate on Payment/Payout flows; Zero regression in RBAC; Payment webhook idempotency verified
risk_factors: Third-party API rate limits; Distributed transaction state synchronization
mitigation_strategies: Use extensive mocking for Stripe/Wise; Implement contract tests; Saga pattern verification
business_value: Protects revenue streams and ensures SOC2 compliance for access control.

automation_tool: Jest (Integration), LocalStack (S3/SQS), Custom AI Validation Scripts
roi_calculation: Immediate - Manual verification of AI extraction is slow (20 mins/doc). Automation reduces validation to seconds. Break-even in < 1 month.
infrastructure_setup: S3 buckets for test corpus; OpenAI mock/caching proxy
success_metrics: SOW extraction accuracy > 85%; PII redaction failure rate < 1%
risk_factors: AI non-determinism causing flaky tests; AWS Comprehend costs during testing
mitigation_strategies: Use 'Golden Master' test documents; Mock AI responses for logic tests; Integration tests for accuracy only on release
business_value: Validates the core value proposition (AI automation) and ensures GDPR compliance.

roi_calculation: Long-term - Prevents costly security breaches and compliance fines. Manual pen-testing is expensive/infrequent; automation ensures continuous compliance.
infrastructure_setup: CI pipeline stages for ZAP/k6; Dedicated perf env with RDS pgvector
success_metrics: Zero High/Critical vulns; API p95 < 250ms under 1k load; Vector search < 500ms
risk_factors: False positives in security scans; Load tests impacting staging data
mitigation_strategies: Baseline tuning for ZAP; Isolated data subsets for perf testing; Rate limiting bypass for test agents
business_value: Certifies platform for Enterprise clients; mitigating legal/reputational risk.

roi_calculation: Medium - UI changes frequently. Focus E2E on stable paths (Registration, Proposal Submission). Component tests for complex UI (Split-pane).
infrastructure_setup: Parallelized Playwright workers; Visual regression baseline images
success_metrics: Cross-browser compatibility (Chrome/Firefox/Safari); Accessibility WCAG 2.1 AA pass
risk_factors: Brittle E2E tests due to frequent UI changes; Flakiness in drag-and-drop tests
mitigation_strategies: Use `data-testid` attributes; extensive component testing over E2E; Visual regression testing for layout stability
business_value: Ensures vendor adoption by guaranteeing a smooth, accessible user experience.

roi_calculation: Low/Incremental - Covers edge cases, notifications, and logging. Essential for system maturity but lower immediate business impact.
infrastructure_setup: Chaos testing scripts; MailHog for email verification
success_metrics: Notification delivery reliability; Audit log completeness; Graceful degradation during outages
risk_factors: Over-testing low value paths; High maintenance cost for low ROI tests
mitigation_strategies: Strict ROI review for new tests; Delete obsolete tests; Focus on resilience/recovery
